candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line exists above operating profit, but there is no selected COGS bucket or dedicated cost-of-sales row to attach it to; it appears to relate to total operating expenses rather than specifically to COGS.
Component of the broader D&A disclosure. A higher-level summary row exists, so this should not be chosen separately, and there is no clear COGS bucket in the statement.
Component of the broader D&A disclosure. A higher-level summary row exists, so this should not be chosen separately, and there is no clear COGS bucket in the statement.

variables.notes: No COGS final_choice rows were selected in the earlier mapping, and the statement presents operating expenses by nature rather than with a dedicated COGS line. The separate D&A disclosure should therefore not be added to COGS.

candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line appears above operating profit at the same level as the selected operating expense components. Since earlier XSGA_COMPONENTS explicitly excluded D&A and no SG&A total includes it in the selected rows, this summary row should be added separately. It is preferred over component rows to avoid double counting.
This is a component of the separate D&A disclosure, but a summary row ('Depreciation and amortization') is available and should be preferred to avoid double counting.
This is a component of the separate D&A disclosure, but a summary row ('Depreciation and amortization') is available and should be preferred to avoid double counting.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS are Research and development expenses, Other operating expenses, and Personal expenses. The statement shows a distinct operating D&A row outside those selected buckets and above Operating Expenses - Total, so it should be added separately. Component D&A rows are not selected because the summary row is present. R&D is already separately visible and selected for XRD, and there is no separate 'Amortization in R&D' row to handle specially.
